meta.label: Agency
meta.description: Brightline Studio — 12-person creative agency. Lumpy retainer flow with biweekly payroll and a tight first-of-month convergence.

explanations.explanation: By the week of April 27, your projected balance falls to about $4,065 — about $935 below your $5,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are GUSTO PAYROLL BIWEEKLY (~$22,400), WESTLAKE PROPERTIES RENT (~$6,500), ANTHEM BCBS GROUP HEALTH (~$4,800). One concrete lever: consider asking a top customer to settle a few days earlier so cash lands before payday, or move payroll to the day after the largest retainer hits.

By the week of July 20, your projected balance falls to about $1,117 — about $3,883 below your $5,000 floor. The biggest hits this week are GUSTO PAYROLL BIWEEKLY (~$22,400), LINEAR APP TEAM (~$260), GITHUB TEAM (~$75). One concrete lever: consider asking a top customer to settle a few days earlier so cash lands before payday, or move payroll to the day after the largest retainer hits.
